title: rv.ui_proof_result.v1
description: Result envelope emitted by stock-analyzer-ui-random50-proof.mjs (and CI runner wrappers). Consumed by release-gate-check.mjs and final-integrity-seal.mjs as the browser-validation gate.

observed_commit.description: Commit SHA actually rendered on the target page. Null only when status=runner_failed and the runner could not load the page.

page_core_snapshot.description: snapshot_id read from /data/page-core/latest.json on the candidate.

required.description: Quota requirement count for this sample mode.

completed.description: How many assets the runner actually visited and asserted on.

status.description: ok = every visited asset passed acceptance; failed = at least one asset failed; runner_failed = harness could not execute (browser missing libs, spawn died, target unreachable).

failures.description: Per-asset failure summaries (truncated to max_failures from request).

allowed_degraded.description: Count of assets that rendered a typed-degraded UI state which the harness accepted under --accept-typed-degraded.

global_assertions.description: Per-run global checks (universe ssot_total, NASDAQ extension shape, etc).
